title: Aggregate Fact Table Creation and Usage Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of creating aggregate fact tables from base fact tables and their subsequent use for faster querying in a data warehouse.
relationships: ETL Process summarizes data from Base Fact Table to create Aggregate Fact Table
Business User Query is directed to Aggregate Fact Table for faster performance
OLAP Cube/Reporting Tool uses Aggregate Fact Table as a data source
